title: bauera microphylla
intro: Bauera microphylla, also known as the Tasmanian peppermint bush or Bauera, is a low-growing, woody shrub native to Tasmania, Australia. The plant contains diterpenoid alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Bauera microphylla include its ability to aid in digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant properties. Bauera microphylla can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health enthusiasts.
